title: Floral Canadian Rice Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the freshness of floral flavors with the heartiness of Canadian rice. This recipe is a great option for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Fresh herbs (such as parsley and dill)

instructions: Heat the floral oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the Canadian rice and stir to coat with the oil.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the water has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the fresh herbs and fried shallots.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the rice hot, garnished with additional fresh herbs if desired.
